Meet ‘Kashi Ki Lata’ Mangala Kapoor: Acid attack survivor who won a Padma Shri
description: A childhood acid attack irrevocably altered Mangala Kapoor's life at 12, leading to numerous surgeries. Yet, she found solace and strength in classical music, transforming it into her identity. Her dedication led to a distinguished academic career and teaching at Banaras Hindu University. Now, the Padma Shri award recognizes a remarkable journey of resilience, where her voice and talent have triumphed over adversity, defining her beyond her past trauma.

NBA trade rumor: Lakers eye Cavaliers center to support Luka Doncic
description: The Los Angeles Lakers would reportedly pursue a sign-and-trade sending LeBron James to the Cleveland Cavaliers for center Jarrett Allen, ESPN's Brian Windhorst said June 24, 2026 on ESPN Cleveland radio. James, an unrestricted free agent carrying a roughly $59.5 million cap hold, made $52.6 million last season. The proposal has gained traction because Allen would address the Lakers' long-standing need at center while complementing Luka Doncic and newly re-signed Austin Reaves.

‘Felt humiliated’: How row over train door turned deadly in Mumbai local; passenger stabbed
description: A shocking act of violence unfolded on a Mumbai local train as a clothing store employee allegedly stabbed a co-passenger to death following an argument over a train door. The dispute, reportedly sparked by rain splashing passengers, escalated when the accused, feeling humiliated, repeatedly attacked the victim. Authorities apprehended the suspect in Panvel while he was attempting to flee.
